keys.description: Default code template for bulk-issue when the caller doesn't provide one. Substitutions: {RAND8} (8-char Crockford), {RAND4}, {SEQ} (1..N zero-padded), {CAMPAIGN} (kebab of campaign_name), literal characters.
Random-suffix entropy for {RAND8} template substitution. Default 40 bits = ~1 in 1T collision rate for the 8-char Crockford suffix per tenant scope.
How many times to retry code generation on unique-constraint collision before giving up. Rare — 8-char + 40-bit entropy on a per-tenant scope.
Hard cap on the count parameter of POST /coupons/bulk-issue. Prevents accidental huge bulk operations.

Retry delay for concurrent redemption attempts that lose the SELECT ... FOR UPDATE race. The transaction that lost retries once after this delay before returning COUPON_USAGE_CAP_REACHED / COUPON_CUSTOMER_LIMIT_REACHED.
Default per_customer_limit when the caller doesn't provide one. 1 = each customer can redeem at most once per coupon.
Cron for ReconcileUsageCountJob. Default nightly 03:00 UTC.
Cron for ExpireCouponsJob. Default nightly 04:00 UTC.
Any usage_count drift >= this threshold fires a P2 signal to observability. Default 1 (zero tolerance).
Default retention window in years for coupons + coupon_redemptions post-expiry/reversal. Enterprise `coupon_extended_retention` uses 10y.
Extended retention window when Enterprise entitlement is on.
Cron for PurgeExpiredCouponsJob. Default weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC.

Rate limit for redemption attempts (indirect — measured by preview + validate call counts, since redemption itself is only reachable through the invoice module). Applied via coupon.rate_limit middleware.
Daily ceiling on preview + validate call count per IP. Escalates rate-limit response from 429 to 403 after this threshold.

When true (default), coupons with issuance_source='referral' additionally run through growth::referrals::FraudDetector at redemption time. When false, only usage_cap + per_customer_limit + rate_limit are enforced.
Master toggle for the marketing lane. Off = CouponRedeemed does NOT fire downstream marketing events. Used when growth::marketing is unstable.
Schema version of the discount_snapshot JSONB blob. Downstream consumers (marketing, finance) branch on this to handle evolution.
